scope: Port the session memory notes maintainer onto AgenC runtime services.

requiredBehaviors: session notes are created under an AgenC config-home project/session directory with private file permissions
the service reads the notes file through AgenC FileRead, seeds child read-before-edit state, and lets the child use only Edit on the exact notes file
extraction thresholds preserve initialization tokens, minimum token growth, tool-call cadence, and natural-break extraction behavior
manual extraction bypasses thresholds but still uses the same notes setup, prompt construction, and child tool policy
prompt templates preserve the fixed markdown structure, load user overrides from AgenC config home, substitute variables in one pass, and add section-size reminders
edgeCases: non-main query sources do not start extraction
assistant turns that still contain tool calls are skipped until a safe break
session memory can be disabled by AgenC environment gates
oversized notes sections are truncated on line boundaries for compact consumers

requiredBehaviors: the live turn loop launches session memory extraction from the idle post-sampling path
background extraction failures are emitted as warnings and never fail the user turn
edgeCases: subagent query sources are filtered by the service before extraction
